x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist natural language processing performs best on English text. High non-ASCII rates indicate multilingual incident data that may require additional language pack configuration.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Conduct a manual language spot-check of incident short_description and close_notes fields. If significant non-English volume is confirmed, engage ServiceNow account team to discuss multilingual Now Assist language pack configuration.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_f2f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c4f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist natural language processing performs best on English text. High non-ASCII rates indicate multilingual incident data that may require additional language pack configuration.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Incident Language Distribution</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' incidents in last 12 months (manual language spot-check recommended)';

    return {
        status: 'ready',
        actualValue: actualValue,
        finding: total + ' incidents in the last 12 months. Conduct a manual language spot-check of short_description and close_notes fields. If significant non-English volume is present, confirm multilingual Now Assist language pack configuration with your account team.'
    };
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000328</number><order>140</order><remediation_guidance>Conduct a manual language spot-check of incident short_description and close_notes fields. If significant non-English volume is confirmed, engage ServiceNow account team to discuss multilingual Now Assist language pack configuration.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>f2f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c4f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Incident Language Distribution</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_f2f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c4f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
